title: YTP: Mama Luigi Needs Medicine
description: My first video. :) Our favorite plumber Luigi has engaged in a tale of valor, mystery excitement, in a tale of the ages for Yoshi in his bedtime story, but randomness ensues when it is evident that Mama Luigi may need some medicine...
